product_overview: PEB CRM is a modular business management platform for lead tracking, customer and project management, inventory control, document generation, finance operations, and accounting. The app supports a full PEB-industry workflow from lead capture through project execution, billing, and financial visibility.
core_goals: Capture and manage leads through the sales pipeline
Convert leads into customers and initiate projects
Track customer and project records with related documents and activities
Manage inventory stock and warehouse-linked records
Create, convert, and view business documents such as estimates, proposals, quotations, and invoices
Record and manage financial transactions including invoices, payments, expenses, receivables, payables, vendors, and bank accounts
Provide consistent detail views, forms, and navigation across core modules

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password to access protected areas of the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email address -> Enter password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the protected destination after successful authentication
Navigate to /login -> Enter an invalid email format -> See inline validation feedback
Navigate to /login -> Enter a password that is too short -> See inline validation feedback

features.name: Route Protection
features.description: Prevent unauthenticated access to protected application routes and redirect users appropriately.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard while signed out -> Get redirected to /login with a redirect parameter
Navigate to /login while already signed in -> Get redirected to the dashboard
Navigate to a protected route after signing in -> See the requested protected page

features.name: Item Master Management
features.description: Create, search, filter, view, edit, and delete canonical item definitions used across the product catalog and downstream modules.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/item -> Search items by code, name, brand, specification, or HSN -> Filter items by category, brand, unit, type class, tax type, or status -> Open the create item dialog -> Select a category and observe the generated item code -> Fill in item details -> Submit the form -> See the new item in the list
Navigate to /dashboard/item -> Open an item detail drawer -> Review the item metadata -> Close the drawer
Navigate to /dashboard/item -> Open an existing item for editing -> Update fields -> Submit the form -> See the updated item in the list
Navigate to /dashboard/item -> Delete an item from row actions -> See the item removed from the list

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Manage stock quantities and warehouse-linked inventory records using item master data as read-only reference information.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> Open the inventory item form -> Select an existing item master record -> Review the read-only item metadata -> Edit stock quantities and warehouse-specific fields -> Save the stock update -> See the updated inventory record

Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> Open the inventory page -> Search inventory items -> Review stock status and warehouse information -> Open an item detail page -> See stock and movement information
Navigate to /dashboard/inventory -> Open a stock movement form -> Select an item -> Choose a movement type -> Enter quantity and warehouse details -> Submit the form -> See the movement recorded

features.name: Documents Module
features.description: Create and manage estimates, proposals, and quotations, with conversion snapshots stored centrally.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/documents -> Open the documents dashboard -> Create an estimate -> Fill in document details -> Submit the form -> See the estimate in the list
Navigate to /dashboard/documents/estimates -> Open an estimate -> Convert the estimate into a proposal -> See the newly created proposal
Navigate to /dashboard/documents/proposals -> Open a proposal -> Convert the proposal into a quotation -> See the newly created quotation
Navigate to /dashboard/documents -> Open a document drawer -> Preview or download the PDF -> Close the drawer

features.name: Project Detail Navigation
features.description: Move from project records into related document areas and linked project resources.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/projects -> Open a project detail page -> Switch to the documents tab -> Navigate to linked estimates, proposals, or quotations -> Open the full documents module for the current project
Navigate to /dashboard/projects -> Open a project detail page -> Review linked documents and navigation targets -> Return to the project overview

features.name: Finance Module
features.description: Manage financial records such as invoices, payments, expenses, receivables, payables, vendors, and bank accounts from a centralized finance dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/finance -> Open the finance dashboard -> Review KPI cards and recent activity -> Switch to invoices, payments, expenses, receivables, payables, vendors, or bank accounts -> Browse the corresponding records
Navigate to /dashboard/finance -> Open an invoice form -> Fill in invoice data -> Submit the form -> See the invoice in the list
Navigate to /dashboard/finance -> Open a payment or expense form -> Fill in the record details -> Submit the form -> See the new record reflected in the module
Navigate to /dashboard/finance -> Open a record drawer -> Review full details -> Close the drawer

routes.description: Root entry page
User login page with mock-or-API authentication fallback
Main dashboard overview
Lead management list and CRUD flows
Customer management list and CRUD flows
Project management list and CRUD flows
Project detail view with linked document navigation
Canonical item master module
Legacy item-master route redirected to canonical item module
Item detail page
Inventory stock operations and warehouse-linked records
Finance dashboard and financial record workflows
Accounting dashboard and accounting workflows
Documents dashboard for business documents
Estimate management and conversion entry point
Proposal management and estimate-to-proposal conversion flow
Quotation management and proposal-to-quotation conversion flow
Document detail page
Settings landing page
Super-admin dashboard

features.name: User Login
features.description: User signs in with email and password, receives session cookie/local storage token, and is redirected to the requested protected route.
user_interactions: See inline validation for invalid email or short password
See loading spinner while authentication runs
Redirect to dashboard or requested route after success

features.name: Route Protection
features.description: Middleware protects dashboard, item, accounting, settings, and super-admin routes based on auth cookie presence.
user_interactions: Navigate to a protected route while logged out
Get redirected to login with redirect query parameter
Navigate to login while already authenticated

features.name: Item Master Management
features.description: Manage enterprise item definitions separately from inventory, with system-generated item codes and item detail views.
user_interactions: Search items by item code, item name, brand, specification, or HSN
Filter items by category, brand, unit, type class, tax type, and status
Select a category and view auto-generated item code
Delete an item from row actions

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Manage stock quantities, stock status, warehouse assignment, and inventory-specific records while consuming item master data read-only.
user_interactions: Select an existing item master record
Edit stock quantities and warehouse-specific fields

features.name: Documents Module
features.description: Create and manage estimates, proposals, and quotations as business documents, with conversion snapshots stored centrally.
user_interactions: Convert an estimate into a proposal
Convert a proposal into a quotation

features.name: Project Detail Navigation
features.description: Project details link users into the dedicated Documents module instead of handling uploads inline in the project page.
user_interactions: Navigate to linked estimates, proposals, or quotations
Open the full documents module for the current project

features.name: Finance Module
features.description: Manage financial records such as income, expenses, invoices, and payments through an axios-backed service layer with mock fallback.
user_interactions: Filter or browse invoices, expenses, and payments

known_limitations.issue: Authentication backend is not present in the workspace; login falls back to a development mock when /auth/login is unavailable.
known_limitations.impact: Production-grade auth cannot be fully validated without a real backend endpoint.

known_limitations.issue: Document conversion still uses session storage snapshots, now centralized, so conversions are browser-session scoped rather than persisted server-side.
known_limitations.impact: Refresh-safe persistence and auditability require backend support.

known_limitations.issue: Multiple services still use local mock data or mock fallbacks instead of a connected backend.
known_limitations.impact: Some CRUD validations may represent frontend behavior rather than persisted backend behavior.
